ksa_text: Develop, maintain, and update Records of Processing Activities (ROPA), documenting processing purposes, data categories, recipient categories, international transfers, retention periods, and security measures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure security design and cybersecurity development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of security implementation) and updated as necessary.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

Ensure security design and cybersecurity development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of security implementation) and updated as necessary.
Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-006 (RC, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4205 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.421, onet=0.408, dcwf=0.397) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4205 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-T-006 (composite 0.4205) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.4205 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.4205 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4205, domain RC, scope weak fit. High confidence.
